Martial: Shocking Burst, Stunning +10, H.description:
Shocking Burst: This weapon is sheathed in crackling electricity, and deals 1 to
6 electric damage each hit. Critical hits deal an additional 1 to 10 electric
damage for weapons with a x2 critical multiplier, 2 to 20 for a x3 multiplier
and 3 to 30 for a x4 multiplier.
Stunning +10
Heightened Awareness 4: This item helps you to quickly read situations with
sharpness and clarity, allowing you to predict actions before they occur.
You gain a +4 Insight bonus to AC.

Martial: Acid Burst, Greater Stone Priso.description:
Acid Burst: This weapon is sheathed in corrosive acid, and does 1 to 6 acid damage
each hit. Critical hits deal an additional 1 to 10 acid damage for weapons with
a x2 critical multiplier, 2 to 20 for a x3 multiplier and 3 to 30 for a x4
multiplier.
Greater Stone Prison: This weapon is invested with the power of the earth.
On an attack roll of 20 which is confirmed as a critical hit it will attempt
to turn the target to stone, as the Flesh to Stone spell. A successful
Fortitude save (DC 33) negates this effect.
Earthgrab: This weapon stores the implacable strength of the earth deep within.
When this weapon is used, this power occasionally comes to the surface, calling
on the earth to erupt from the ground and hold an enemy in place.

Martial: Icy Burst, Freezing Ice, Fire S.description:
Icy Burst: This weapon is sheathed in icy cold, and deals 1 to 6 cold damage each hit.
Critical hits deal an additional 1 to 10 cold damage for weapons with a x2
critical multiplier, 2 to 20 for a x3 multiplier and 3 to 30 for a x4
multiplier.
Freezing Ice: This Weapon stores the pitiless immovable power of the ice deep
within. When this weapon is used, this power occasionally comes to the surface,
attempting to freeze an enemy solid and encase them in ice.
Fire Shield (Cold): When you are successfully attacked, there is a 10% chance
that a Fire Shield (Cold) will be cast on you. If this effect activates while
you have an active Fire Shield (Hot) from another item source, they will
nullify each-other.

Martial: Flaming Burst, Flaming Blast, S.description:
Flaming Burst: This weapon is sheathed in fire, and deals 1 to 6 fire damage each hit.
Critical hits deal an additional 1 to 10 fire damage for weapons with a x2
critical multiplier, 2 to 20 for a x3 multiplier and 3 to 30 for a x4
multiplier.
Flaming Blast: A flaming blast weapon is sheathed in fire. Critical hits with
this weapon deal an additional 1 to 10 fire damage for weapons with a x2
critical multiplier, 2 to 20 for a x3 critical multiplier, and 3 to 30 for a
x4 multiplier. Additionally, if you roll a 20 when attacking and confirm the
critical hit, the weapon blasts your target, doing 4 to 24 more fire damage.
Seeker +10: Provides a +10 Enhancement bonus to confirm critical hits, and a
+10 Enhancement bonus to critical hit damage (before multipliers are applied).

Mystical: Magnetism +90, Metal Type Effe.description:
Magnetism +90: Passive: +90 Equipment bonus to Electricity Spell Power.
Bonus Effects based on the Material Selected.
Air Guard: This Weapon stores the incredible, dynamic power of the air deep within.
When the user of this weapon is successfully attacked in melee, this power
occasionally comes to the surface, knocking enemies over or speeding up the
wearer with rushing winds.

Mystical: Corrosion +90, Metal Type Effe.description:

Bonus Effects based on the Material Selected.
Earthgrab Guard: This item stores the implacable strength of the earth deep within.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this power
occasionally comes to the surface, calling on the earth to erupt from the ground
and hold an enemy in place.

Mystical: Glaciation +90, Metal Type Eff.description:
Glaciation +90: Passive: +90 Equipment bonus to Cold Spell Power.
Bonus Effects based on the Material Selected.
Freezing Ice Guard: This item stores the pitiless immovable power of the ice
deep within. When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee,
this power occasionally comes to the surface, attempting to freeze an enemy
solid and encase them in ice.

Mystical: Combustion +90, Metal Type Eff.description:
Combustion +90: Passive: +90 Equipment bonus to Fire Spell Power.
Bonus Effects based on the Material Selected.
Magma Surge Guard: This item stores the immeasurable heart of the planet's molten
mantle. When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee,
superheated magma occasionally surges to the surface, slowing an enemy down
and inflicting massive fire damage over time.

Martial: Alchemical Dexterity +2, Lighti.description:
+2 Alchemical bonus to Dexterity
Lightning Strike: This weapon stores the power of a volatile thunderstorm deep
within. Occasionally, this dynamic power comes to the surface, devastating
enemies with a massive lightning strike.
Doublestrike 6%: Passive: 6% Enhancement bonus to Doublestrike. (Doublestrike
is a chance to score an additional hit with a melee attack.)

Martial: Alchemical Constitution +2, Aci.description:
+2 Alchemical bonus to Constitution
Acid Blast: An acid blast weapon is sheathed in corrosive acid. Critical hits
with this weapon deal an additional 1 to 10 acid damage for weapons with a x2
critical multiplier, 2 to 20 for a x3 critical multiplier, and 3 to 30 for a
x4 multiplier. Additionally, if you roll a 20 when attacking and confirm the
critical hit, the weapon blasts your target, doing 4 to 24 more acid damage.
Disintegration: This weapon has a dark, insidious power deep within.
Occasionally, this power lashes out violently at enemies and attempts to
disintegrate them.

Martial: Alchemical Wisdom +2, Crushing.description:
+2 Alchemical bonus to Wisdom
Crushing Wave: This weapon stores the unstoppable force of the ocean's fury deep
within. When this weapon is used, this power occasionally comes to the surface,
crushing enemies beneath a torrent of frigid water.
Corrosive Salt: This weapon stores a caustic, insatiable power deep within.
When this weapon is used, this power can come to the surface in the form of a
noxious, corrosive salt that dissolves all substances.

Martial: Alchemical Strength +2, Inciner.description:
+2 Alchemical bonus to Strength
Incineration: This weapon stores the power of a raging inferno deep within.
Occasionally, this destructive power comes to the surface, devastating enemies
with massive fire damage.
Righteous: This weapon is imbued with holy power, giving it an additional +2 to
attack bonus and damage against any evil creature. This power makes the weapon
good-aligned.

Martial: +6 Enhancement Bonus, Electric.description:
+6 Enhancement Bonus: +6 Enhancement bonus to attack and damage rolls.
Electric Storm: This weapon is imbued with an electrifying wrath. On an attack
roll of 20 which is confirmed as a critical hit this power will be released,
dealing damage to the target and all enemies near it for 15d6 electric damage.
A successful Reflex save (DC 39) reduces this by half.

Martial: +6 Enhancement Bonus, Acid Torr.description:
+6 Enhancement Bonus: +6 Enhancement bonus to attack and damage rolls.
Acid Torrent: This weapon is imbued with a vitriolic wrath. On an attack roll
of 20 which is confirmed as a critical hit this power will be released,
dealing damage to the target and all enemies near it for 15d6 acid damage.
A successful Reflex save (DC 39) reduces this by half.

Martial: +6 Enhancement Bonus, Freezing.description:
+6 Enhancement Bonus: +6 Enhancement bonus to attack and damage rolls.
Freezing Gale: This weapon is imbued with a frigid wrath. On an attack roll of
20 which is confirmed as a critical hit this freezing power will be released,
dealing damage to the target and all enemies near it for 15d6 cold damage.
A successful Reflex save (DC 39) reduces this by half.

Martial: +6 Enhancement Bonus, Fiery Det.description:
+6 Enhancement Bonus: +6 Enhancement bonus to attack and damage rolls.

20 which is confirmed as a critical hit this burning power will be released,
dealing damage to the target and all enemies near it for 15d6 fire damage.
A successful Fortitude save (DC 39) reduces this by half.

Eldritch Rune of Fortification.description:
Fortification +100%: This suit of armor or shield produces a magical force that
protects vital areas of the wearer much more effectively. When a critical hit
or sneak attack is scored on the wearer, there is a 100% chance that the
critical hit or sneak attack is negated and damage is instead rolled normally.

Eldritch Rune of Resistance.description: Resistance +5: Passive: +5 Resistance bonus to Fortitude, Reflex, and Will Saving Throws.

Eldritch Rune of Greater False Life.description: Greater False Life: This item grants the wearer +30 maximum health

Fearsome: This item causes those who strike the user to be overcome with terror, as
from the Fear spell (DC 17)

Eldritch Rune of Featherfalling.description:
Feather Falling: This item is engraved with feathers and bestows a powerful magical
effect. Whenever the wearer begins to fall from any height, this effect slows
the descent dramatically, causing the wearer to fall like a feather.

Eldritch Rune of Deathward.description:
Deathblock: This effect grants immunity to all death spells and magical death effects.
This includes immunity to Implosion, which can normally bypass the death immunity
of Undead and Constructs.

Eldritch Rune of Lionheart.description:
Lionheart: The user of this item has a chance to gain the benefits of the Remove Fear
spell when being hit in melee.

Eldritch Rune of Lesser Healing Amplific.description:

+20 (Exceptional bonus). Includes spells, potions, and other effects.

Sovereign Rune of Lorikk.description: Adds the Lorikk's Champion set bonus.

Sovereign Rune of Tharne.description: Adds the Tharne's Wrath set bonus.

Sovereign Rune of Natural Armor.description: Natural Armor +4: Passive: +4 Natural Armor Bonus to Armor Class.

Sovereign Rune of Insight.description:
Heightened Awareness 4: This item helps you to quickly read situations with sharpness
and clarity, allowing you to predict actions before they occur. You gain a +4
Insight bonus to AC.

Sovereign Rune of Air.description:
Air Guard: This Weapon stores the incredible, dynamic power of the air deep within.
When the user of this weapon is successfully attacked in melee, this power
occasionally comes to the surface, knocking enemies over or speeding up the
wearer with rushing winds.

Sovereign Rune of Dust.description:
Disintegration Guard: This item has a store of dark, insidious power deep within.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this power
occasionally lashes out violently at enemies and attempts to disintegrate them.

Sovereign Rune of Stoneskin.description:
Earthen Guard: When you are successfully attacked, there is a chance that a Stone
Skin will be cast on you.

Sovereign Rune of Earth.description:
Earthgrab Guard: This item stores the implacable strength of the earth deep within.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this power
occasionally comes to the surface, calling on the earth to erupt from the ground
and hold an enemy in place.

Sovereign Rune of Ash.description:
Enervation Guard: This item stores a menacing, ravenous power deep within.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this power
occasionally comes to the surface, draining the life force of the enemy and
giving negative levels.

Sovereign Rune of Ice.description:
Freezing Ice Guard: This item stores the pitiless immovable power of the ice deep within.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this power
occasionally comes to the surface, attempting to freeze an enemy solid and encase
them in ice.

Sovereign Rune of Dancing.description: Melodic Guard: When being hit there is a chance for the opponent to dance.

Sovereign Rune of Ooze.description:
Sundering Ooze Guard: This item stores the corrosive, voracious power of the ooze deep
within. When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this
power can come to the surface, decreasing an opponents AC, and occasionally
summoning a wild ooze that will fight against your enemies.

Sovereign Rune of Radiance.description:
Radiance Guard: This item is imbued with a brilliant, radiant power. When the wearer
of this item is successfully attacked in melee, the attacker has a chance of
being hit by 4d6 points of light damage and has a chance of being blinded.

Sovereign Rune of Crippling.description:
Adds Crippling to any equipped Melee weapon.
A crippling weapon is infused with binding power so that when a target is critically
hit their movement is slowed by half (making it crippled).

Sovereign Rune of Destruction.description:
Adds Destruction to any equipped Melee weapon.
On Hit: Your target gains a stack of Armor Destruction. (-1 penalty to Armor Class,
-1% of its Fortification. 20 second duration. Stacks up to 15 times.)
This effect may trigger once every three seconds.

Sovereign Rune of Smiting.description:
Adds Smiting to any equipped Melee/Ranged weapon.
Smiting is a powerful weapon enchantment that may cause the death of a construct
on a Vorpal Strike. Constructs suffer 4d6 additional damage per hit with a 100
Bane damage bonus on confirmed vorpal strikes if the construct has 1,000 or more
current HP (or is immune to instant death, such as the red-/purple-named bosses
such as the Portals in The Shroud), else a vorpal strike will kill it outright.

Sovereign Rune of Threat.description: Incite +20: +20% Enhancement bonus to increased threat generation from melee damage.

Sovereign Rune of Health.description:
Harnessing a small amount of the power and potential of the raw elements, this items
gives you a +20 bonus to your maximum hit points. This stacks with all bonuses
except Greater Elemental Energy.

Sovereign Rune of Spell Power.description:
Harnessing a small amount of the power and potential of the raw elements, this items
gives you a +100 bonus to your maximum spell points. This stacks with all bonuses
except Greater Elemental Spell Power.

Sovereign Rune of Arcane Sigil.description:
Arcane Sigil: The arcane sigil inscribed on this item lowers the arcane spell failure
chance by -10%.

When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this power can
come to the surface in the form of a noxious, corrosive salt that dissolves all
substances.

Tempest Rune of Water.description:
Crushing Wave Guard: This item stores the unstoppable force of the ocean's fury deep
within. When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this
power occasionally comes to the surface, crushing enemies beneath a torrent of
frigid water.

Tempest Rune of Magma.description:
Magma Surge Guard: This item stores the immeasurable heart of the planet's molten
mantle. When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee,
superheated magma occasionally surges to the surface, slowing an enemy down and
inflicting massive fire damage over time.

Tempest Rune of Sight.description: The bearer of this item gains the benefit of True Seeing spell continuously.

Command. This armor or shield always appears brilliant and gleaming, no matter

Air Guard: This Weapon stores the incredible, dynamic power of the air deep within.
When the user of this weapon is successfully attacked in melee, this power
occasionally comes to the surface, knocking enemies over or speeding up the
wearer with rushing winds.
Air:Air:Air

Aspect of Earth II.description:
Earthgrab Guard: This item stores the implacable strength of the earth deep within.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this power
occasionally comes to the surface, calling on the earth to erupt from the
ground and hold an enemy in place.
Earth:Earth:Earth

Aspect of Fire II.description:
Incineration Guard: This item stores the power of a raging inferno deep within.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this destructive
power occasionally comes to the surface, devastating enemies with massive fire
damage.
Fire:Fire:Fire

Aspect of Water II.description:
Crushing Wave Guard: This item stores the unstoppable force of the ocean's fury deep
within. When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this
power occasionally comes to the surface, crushing enemies beneath a torrent of
frigid water.
Water:Water:Water

Aspect of Positive Energy II.description:
Greater Disruption Guard: This Item stores a holy and righteous power deep within.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee by undead, this
power occasionally comes to the surface, annihilating enemy undead.
Positive:Positive:Positive

Aspect of Negative Energy II.description:
Slay Living Guard: This item stores a dark and sinister power deep within. When the
wearer of this is successfully attacked in melee, this power occasionally comes
to the surface, attempting to instantly snuff out the life force of the enemy.
Negative:Negative:Negative

Aspect of Ice II.description:
Freezing Ice Guard: This item stores the pitiless immovable power of the ice deep within.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this power
occasionally comes to the surface, attempting to freeze an enemy solid and
encase them in ice.
Air:Water:Air+Water

Aspect of Lightning II.description:
Lightning Storm Guard: This item stores the power of a volatile thunderstorm deep within.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this dynamic
power occasionally comes to the surface, devastating enemies with a massive
lightning strike.
Air:Positive:Air+Positive

Aspect of Vacuum II.description:
Trap the Soul Guard: This item stores an overwhelming, merciless power deep within.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this power
occasionally comes to the surface, sucking out the life force of an enemy and
imprisoning the essence of their body and soul in a gem.
Air:Negative:Air+Negative

Tempered II.description:
Elemental Mastery Guard: This item is imbued with the energy of elemental mastery.
Where the forces of the elements converge in harmony, each is equally potent.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, there is a
chance that the attacker will take 1d6 of any or all of the following elemental
damage types: acid, electric, fire and cold.
Fire:Water:Earth+Air

Aspect of Dust II.description:
Disintegration Guard: This item has a store of dark, insidious power deep within.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this power
occasionally lashes out violently at enemies and attempts to disintegrate them.
Earth:Negative:Earth+Negative

Aspect of Smoke II.description:

concealment chance to miss you.
Air:Fire:Fire+Air

Aspect of Magma II.description:
Magma Surge Guard: This item stores the immeasurable heart of the planet's molten mantle.
When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, superheated
magma occasionally surges to the surface, slowing an enemy down and inflicting
massive fire damage over time.
Earth:Fire:Fire+Earth

Aspect of Radiance II.description:
Radiance Guard: This item is imbued with a brilliant, radiant power. When the wearer of
this item is successfully attacked in melee, the attacker has a chance of being
hit by 4d6 points of light damage and has a chance of being blinded.
Fire:Positive:Fire+Positive

Aspect of Ash II.description:
Enervation Guard: This item stores a menacing, ravenous power deep within. When the wearer
of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this power occasionally comes
to the surface, draining the life force of the enemy and giving negative levels.
Fire:Negative:Fire+Negative

Aspect of Ooze II.description:
Sundering Ooze Guard: This item stores the corrosive, voracious power of the ooze deep
within. When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, this
power can come to the surface, decreasing an opponents AC, and occasionally
summoning a wild ooze that will fight against your enemies.
Earth:Water:Water+Earth

Balance of Land and Sky II.description:

points of untyped damage.
Water:Positive:Water+Positive

Aspect of Salt II.description:

Water:Negative:Water+Negative

Existential Stalemate II.description:

When the wearer of this item is successfully attacked in melee, there is a
chance the item will bestow temporary hit points and grant spell points to
the wearer.
Negative:Positive:Positive+Negative

Legendary Air Strike.description:
Requires Air Air Air
Attacks and spells have a chance [around ~1%] to deal massive
electrical damage [around 2,000 (melee no buff)/around 10,000
(spell with spell amplifier), single target].

Legendary Earth.description:
Requires Earth Earth Earth
Attacks and offensive spells deal stacking Acid damage over
time [100% chance to proc]. Half-second cooldown as of U29P1.
[10-90 damage per stack, maximum 5 stacks, around 250 damage
at full stacks]

Legendary Incineration.description:
Requires Fire Fire Fire
Attacks have a chance [around ~1%] to deal massive Fire damage
[around 2,000 (melee no buff)/around 10,000 (spell with spell amplifier),
single target].

Legendary Water.description:
Requires Water Water Water
Attacks and offensive spells have a chance [5~10%] to inflict
ten stacks of cold damage over time [20~30 damage per stack,
around 250 damage at full stack], adding one stack at a time.
This effect has an internal cooldown.
[cooldown unknown, duration 4 seconds per a stack]

Legendary Affirmation.description:
Attacks and offensive spells have a [10~33%] chance to grant
1,000 temporary hitpoints with 1 minute duration.
Cooldown is also one minute.

Legendary Negation.description:
Requires Negative Negative Negative
Attacks and offensive spells have a [100%, or later nerfed?]
chance to deal 1d3 Negative levels (to a single target).
This has a 30 second cooldown.

Legendary Ice.description:
Requires Air and Water only
Attacks and Offensive Spells have a [10~20%] chance to turn
your target into a block of ice.
(Fortitude? save, AoE, freezes target if it fails save and grants
them DR 100/adamantine, does not add helpless condition)

Legendary Lightning.description:
Requires Positive and Air only
Attacks and offensive spells have a [5~10%] chance to create
Lightning traps. ~160-360 damage, doesn't scale with spell power.
Additional 12d6 lightning damage on hit.

Legendary Vacuum.description:
Attacks and offensive spells have a [30%?] chance to inflict
multiple [2-4] stacks of Vulnerable. Originally had 100%, 6-7 stacks but nerfed.

Legendary Tempered.description:
Requires Air and Earth only
Attacks and offensive spells have a moderate chance
[10~20% for each] to deal extra acid and/or electric damage
[80-120 damage, Spell power not applied].

Legendary Mineral.description:
Requires Earth and Positive only
This weapon bypasses Adamantine, Byeshk, Cold Iron, Mithral,
and Silver DR. This weapon is considerably strengthened,
gaining +150 maximum Durability.

Legendary Dust.description:
Attacks and offensive spells have a 50% chance to reduce enemy
PRR and Positive Healing Amplification. This penalty stacks.
[-7 PRR and -20 healing amp per stack, maximum stack 5, hence -35 PRR
and -100 healing amp at full stack. 11 seconds duration each stack]

Legendary Smoke.description:
Requires Air and Fire only
27% Blurry, Enhancement bonus

Legendary Magma.description:
Requires Earth and Fire only
Attacks and offensive spells deals fire damage over time on
hit or spellcast, and slow enemy movement [100% chance to proc,
20-50 damage pear a stack, maximum 5 stacks, 3 ticks within 4
seconds duration for each stack, slow movement seems to be A
quarter-second cooldown.

Legendary Radiance.description:
Requires Positive and Fire only
Attacks and offensive spells have a [10~20%] chance to blind
enemies with [around 100] Light damage.
(Scales with spell power if triggered by a spell.)
[no save, duration 11 seconds]

Legendary Ash.description:
Attacks and offensive spells have a 50% chance to reduce enemy MRR and Universal
Spell Power. This penalty stacks 3 times, -7 MRR and -20 Universal Spell Power
each time, 12 seconds duration. Can make MRR negative.

Legendary Ooze.description:
Attacks and offensive spells reduce enemy PRR and MRR
[100% proc, minus 10 of each]. Attacks and offensive spells
have a [~5%] chance to summon some kind of Legendary Ooze.
[Summoned Ooze scales with quest level/difficulty, for example,
CR52 one has around 5,000 HP and does about 250+1d8? Acid melee damage]

Legendary Balance of Land and Sky.description:
Requires Fire and Water only
Attacks and offensive spells have a moderate chance to deal
extra acid and/or electric damage.

Legendary Steam.description:
Requires Water and Positive only
Attacks and offensive spells have a [15%] chance to deal untyped
damage. [70-120, ~86 average]

Legendary Salt.description:
Attacks and offensive spells have a [100%] chance to greatly
reduce enemy movement speed and attack speed [about -90% slowdown].
This inflicts 8 stacks, which fade overtime. Has a short internal
cooldown [1/4 seconds]. Doesn't affect bosses.
[duration 11 seconds]

Legendary Concordant Opposition.description:
Requires Positive and Negative only
[1~2%] chance to gain HP and SP when hit [50-60 points, no cooldown?].
Offensive spells have a [~?%] chance to briefly grant 100 temporary
spell points (This has a one minute cooldown).

Shocking Burst.description:
Shocking Burst: This weapon is sheathed in crackling electricity, and deals 1 to 6
electric damage each hit. Critical hits deal an additional 1 to 10 electric
damage for weapons with a x2 critical multiplier, 2 to 20 for a x3 multiplier
and 3 to 30 for a x4 multiplier.

Acid Burst.description:
Acid Burst: This weapon is sheathed in corrosive acid, and does 1 to 6 acid damage
each hit. Critical hits deal an additional 1 to 10 acid damage for weapons with
a x2 critical multiplier, 2 to 20 for a x3 multiplier and 3 to 30 for a x4 multiplier.

Flaming Burst.description:
Flaming Burst: This weapon is sheathed in fire, and deals 1 to 6 fire damage each hit.
Critical hits deal an additional 1 to 10 fire damage for weapons with a x2
critical multiplier, 2 to 20 for a x3 multiplier and 3 to 30 for a x4 multiplier.

Icy Burst.description:
Icy Burst: This weapon is sheathed in icy cold, and deals 1 to 6 cold damage each hit.
Critical hits deal an additional 1 to 10 cold damage for weapons with a x2
critical multiplier, 2 to 20 for a x3 multiplier and 3 to 30 for a x4 multiplier.

Unholy Burst.description:
Unholy Burst: An unholy weapon is imbued with unholy power. This power makes the
weapon evil-aligned and thus bypasses the corresponding damage reduction. It
deals an extra 2 to 12 points of damage against all of good alignment and an
extra 3 to 18 on a critical for weapons with a x2 critical multiplier, 4 to 24
for a x3 multiplier, and 5 to 30 for a x4 multiplier.

Holy Burst.description:
Holy Burst: A holy weapon is imbued with holy power. This power makes the weapon
good-aligned and thus bypasses the corresponding damage reduction. It deals an
extra 2 to 12 points of damage against all of evil alignment and an extra 3 to 18
on a critical for weapons with a x2 critical multiplier, 4 to 24 for a x3 multiplier,
and 5 to 30 for a x4 multiplier.

Requires: 50 Threads of Fate, Empty Soul Vessel and The Invisible Cloak of Strahd
(The Curse of Strahd)

Requires: 50 Threads of Fate, Empty Soul Vessel and Cobalt Guard

Repair Amplification, and also interferes with their ability to use magic by
occasionally Quelling enemies on a Vorpal strike.
Requires: 50 Threads of Fate, Empty Soul Vessel and Spear of the Mournlands
(Legendary Lord of Blades)

Maiming: This weapon has a twisted haft or grip and spikes along its blade, head,
or point. Whenever you score a critical hit with this weapon it deals an amount
of extra untyped damage depending on its critical multiplier: x2 - 1 to 6,
x3 - 2 to 12, x4 - 3 to 18.
Drops in: ToEE: First Level and Earth Temple, and ToEE: Lower Temple Complex,
rare encounter chests

Adamantine: Adamantine weapons may bypass the damage reduction of certain items and creatures.
Drops in: Euphonia's Barter Box

Ruby of the Crushing Wave.description:
Crushing Wave: This weapon stores the unstoppable force of the ocean's fury deep
within. When this weapon is used, this power occasionally comes to the surface,
crushing enemies beneath a torrent of frigid water.
Drop Location: Ghost of a Chance (epic), puzzle chest

Ruby of the Endless Night.description:
Inflicts a Negative Level on vorpal hits.

Ruby of the Iron Hand.description:
Cold Iron: This iron mined deep underground, known for its effectiveness against
fey creatures, is forged at a lower temperature to preserve its delicate properties.
When combined with Good damage types, Cold Iron weapons are able to overcome the
damage reduction of most Demons like Fire Reavers or Flesh Renders. See Monster
DR and weaknesses for specifics.
Drops in: Flurry: Snowpeaks Festival Trader

Ruby of the Snowpeaks.description:
1 to 8 Cold Damage
Freezing Ice: This Weapon stores the pitiless immovable power of the ice deep within.
When this weapon is used, this power occasionally comes to the surface, attempting
to freeze an enemy solid and encase them in ice. 5% chance of Freezing Ice encasement.
Fortitude save DC of 35, Freedom of movement blocks it; doesn't work on bosses,
incorporeal, elementals, or oozes.
Has a duration of 9 seconds, no recurring saves.
Target is immobilized, and helpless (monsters take +25% damage from all sources.)
Drop Location: Flurry: Snowpeaks Festival Trader

Tidal Burst: This weapon is sheathed in water. The weapon deals an additional
1 to 4 damage each hit. In addition, critical hits deal an additional 1 to 8
damage for weapons with a x2 critical multiplier, 2 to 16 for a x3 critical
multiplier and 3 to 24 for a x4 multiplier. Creatures with the Fire trait take
double this damage instead.
Drops in: Euphonia's Barter Box

Ruby of the Vampire Slayer.description:
1 to 4 Light Damage
Silver: A complex process involving metallurgy and alchemy can bond silver to
a weapon made of steel so that it bypasses the damage reduction of creatures
such as devils and vampires. Silver weapons have 2 points lower hardness then
equivalent steel weapons, and as such aren't quite as durable.
Drops in: Joe Candymaker: The Night Revels Trader
